title: Time Wasted and the Urgent Need to Decarbonize
summary: Ian Masters and Joel Clement assess how much time has been lost by governments in facing the looming crisis of climate change, in particular in the United States where the last four years were not only wasted, but were steps backwards from the urgent challenges made clear by the recent alarming IPCC report.
